# trial-to-ae-routing — generated workflow

> Generated by the Workflow Press from the frozen contract (version 1).
> Do not edit the generated Go by hand — update the contract and regenerate.

**Goal.** Route a new trial signup to the right account executive after enriching and scoring it against the ICP, then post the routing decision to the deal channel.

**Operator.** revops

## States

- `received` (initial) — A trial signup has arrived but is not yet enriched.
- `enriched` — Company size and industry have been resolved.
- `scored` — The lead has an ICP fit score from the weighted rubric.
- `routed` (terminal) — The signup has been assigned to an AE and posted to the deal channel.

## Transitions

- `received` → `enriched` on **trial_signed_up** (external)
- `enriched` → `scored` on **enrichment_completed** (internal)
- `scored` → `routed` on **scoring_completed** (internal) guarded by `score_meets_icp`

## Actions

- **enrich_company** (read) on `trial_signed_up` → enrichment-provider
- **score_lead** (read) on `enrichment_completed` → icp-rubric
- **route_to_ae** (internal-write) on `scoring_completed` → crm — requires approval — idempotent
- **post_to_deal_channel** (external-write) on `scoring_completed` → deal-channel — requires approval

## Exceptions

- **enrichment_miss**: when the enrichment provider has no record for the company domain — fall back to the email domain heuristic and flag the signup for manual review
- **no_matching_ae**: when no AE owns the resolved territory/segment — route to the round-robin pool and notify the RevOps operator

## SLAs

- **route_freshness**: time from signup to routed ≤ 5m

## Verification scenarios

- **icp_fit_routes_and_posts** — fire `trial_signed_up` (expects approval); expects 3 transition(s)
- **below_threshold_does_not_route** — fire `scoring_completed`; expects 0 transition(s)

## Execution safety

Actions run through the Workflow Press Executor seam. In this phase the only
backend is the fail-closed host stub: every external write is recorded as **gated**
and is never performed live. The durable adapter (`inngest.go`) is
behavior-equivalent to the local runtime.
